headline: AbbVie’s 340B Lawsuit Puts Drug Discounts And Margins Under The Microscope
summary: AbbVie has filed a legal challenge seeking to narrow and clarify who counts as an "eligible patient" under the federal 340B drug discount program. The case focuses on how hospitals and clinics can access discounted AbbVie medicines for patients treated in different care settings. This move could influence how 340B discounts are applied across the US healthcare system, with implications for pricing, provider budgets and patient access. For investors watching AbbVie, ticker NYSE:ABBV, this...

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider AbbVie (ABBV) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether AbbVie at around US$207.94 is still offering value or starting to look stretched, the next sections will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has seen a 0.4% decline over the last 7 days and is down 8.7% over the past month and 9.3% year to date, while the 1 year return sits at 22.8% and the 3 and 5 year returns are 42.1% and 130.5% respectively.
